english translation text: Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain):“I am very ill and about to die. Are you aware of my state?”
From the day I have seen the crescent of MuharramHow can I tell you O’ Father?
That my heart is engulfed with deep sorrow.Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
You did not fulfill the promiseyou had made to me (before you left for Karbala). What is the reason that you have…
Turned away from your ill and aggrieved daughter?Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
O’ Father, I am afraid of living all alone in this country.If I am so overwhelmed in my own home,
I can’t imagine the extent of fear in my grave.Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
The birds return to their nests as soon as the sun sets each day.How come my family members..
Haven’t returned home from their journey as yet?Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
Since the time you have left (O’ Father), this house feels like a graveEven though I am physically alive,
I look like a lifeless corpse.Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
O’ Father, please give me the news about my baby brother Ali AsgharThroughout the journey, has the infant ever..
Missed me at all?Bibi Fatema Sughra wrote in a letter to her father (Imam Hussain)
